revision.comment: Also avoid auto-using pagename for testcases
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Remove image to match [[:Template:Redirect category shell]] per edit request
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Moving from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules2]] to [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Trimmed off cruft from entries in [[:Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template talk||'''{{small|{{smallcaps|When used with the}} "Redirect category shell" (Rcat shell) {{smallcaps|template:}}}}}}''' {{Mbox | name = This is a redirect/rcat | type = move | image = none | style = margin-top: 1.1em; border: solid 1px darkblue; border-left-width: 0.5em; | textstyle = padding-top: 0.9em; padding-bottom: 0.9em; | text = '''This page is a [[Wikipedia:Redirect|redirect]]. The following [[Wikipedia:Categorizing redirects|categories]] are used to track and monitor this redirect:''' {{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|R avoided double redirect|{{{text|{{ {{#switch:{{PAGENAME}}|This is a redirect/rcat=|This is a redirect/rcat/sandbox=|This is a redirect/rcat/testcases=|#default={{PAGENAME}}}}|embed=yes}}}}}| * (Text of rcat){{{text|{{ {{#switch:{{PAGENAME}}|This is a redirect/rcat=|This is a redirect/rcat/sandbox=|This is a redirect/rcat/testcases=|#default={{PAGENAME}}}}|embed=yes}}}}}}} ''When appropriate, [[WP:PP|protection levels]] are automatically sensed, described and categorized.'' }} :''{{small|Template {{tl|Redirect category shell}} may be used to add one or more [[WP:RCAT|rcat]] templates, along with their parameters and categories, to a redirect. {{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template talk||For more information see the documentation page below.}}}}''{{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Template talk||{{#if:{{{1|}}}||
'''{{small|{{smallcaps|When used by itself:}}}}'''}}}} {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
